---
title: "besoegsdag_9"
subtitle: "`besoegsdag_9`"
description: "besoegsdag_9"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besoegsdag_9/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                            | Title                         | Type   | Description                                                                                                           |
|---------------------------------|-------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                         | The unique name of the event  | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                    |
| `center`                        | Research center               | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                 |
| `date_v9`                       | date_v9                       | date   | Date of visit. Visit 9.                                                                                               |
| `staff_initials_v9`             | staff_initials_v9             | string | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the visit. Visit 9.                                     |
| `identified_name_cpr_v9`        | identified_name_cpr_v9        | string | Indicates whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Visit 9. |
| `relative_v9`                   | relative_v9                   | string | Indicates whether a relative or accompanying person is present at the visit. Visit 9.                                 |
| `relative_name_v9`              | relative_name_v9              | string | The name of the relative attending the visit. Visit 9.                                                                |
| `sens_download_phone_v9`        | sens_download_phone_v9        | string | Whether the participant has downloaded the SENS app to their phone. Visit 9.                                          |
| `sens_id_nr_v9`                 | sens_id_nr_v9                 | string | Identification of the SENS tracker. Visit 9.                                                                          |
| `sens_turned_on_v9`             | sens_turned_on_v9             | string | Indicates if tracker is turned on and time period for measuring registred in webapp. Visit 9.                         |
| `sens_applied_v9`               | sens_applied_v9               | string | Whether SENS device has been applied. Visit 9.                                                                        |
| `sens_notapplied_reason_v9`     | sens_notapplied_reason_v9     | string | Reason why the SENS accelerometer was not applied. Recorded by study staff. Visit 9.                                  |
| `sens_application_date_v9`      | sens_application_date_v9      | date   | Date of SENS application. Visit 9.                                                                                    |
| `sens_info_v9`                  | sens_info_v9                  | string | Whether the participant has received information about SENS. Visit 9.                                                 |
| `sens_patches_and_zip_given_v9` | sens_patches_and_zip_given_v9 | string | Indicates if participant has received zip bag with extra patches. Visit 9.                                            |
| `stool_kit_v9`                  | stool_kit_v9                  | string | Stool sample home collection kit handed out to participant. Visit 9.                                                  |
| `cgm_info_v9`                   | cgm_info_v9                   | string | Whether the participant has been informed about the use of CGM. Visit 9.                                              |
| `cgm_v9`                        | cgm_v9                        | string | Indicates whether the participant has been fitted with a CGM. Visit 9.                                                |
| `cgm_no_v9`                     | cgm_no_v9                     | string | The reason why, if the participant didn't get the CGM on. Visit 9.                                                    |
| `sensorid_v9`                   | sensorid_v9                   | string | The sensors ID number. Visit 9.                                                                                       |
| `cgmreader_v9`                  | cgmreader_v9                  | string | The number of the CGM reader. Visit 9.                                                                                |
| `cgm_envelope_given_v9`         | cgm_envelope_given_v9         | string | Whether the participant has received a zip bag to return the CGM in. Visit 9.                                         |

: Fields in the `besoegsdag_9` resource.
